text:
Two-part question for a video production (Code-100 challenge series #26, NEBBOT/PINLA STUDIO site reveal clip):
1) Chairman says YOU have 文天's (the user's own) cloned VOICE for 配音/voiceover. CONFIRM: what's the exact setup — which tool/service + voice id, and how do you render text→文天-voice mp3? Report the command/recipe. If you have a reference voice sample, note its path.
2) Stand by to render a short Chinese narration script (~30 chars, ~11s) in 文天's voice once Chairman approves the script — I'll send you the final text.
Report your 文天-voice capability now via bin/warroom-say (under 800 chars). Do NOT generate anything yet.
